summary: Created update_build.py and build_worker_complete.py scripts. Both scripts are functional with proper datetime handling and comprehensive CLI interfaces. update_build.py provides status, complete, and close commands for build state management. build_worker_complete.py provides backward compatibility for legacy v1 builds.
learnings: Fixed deprecation warnings for datetime.utcnow() by using datetime.now(timezone.utc). Both scripts tested successfully and meet the specified requirements.
